fragment:
@($"Calling introspect with token: {context.Variables["token"]}")
@($"https://auth-i.bmwgroup.net/auth/oauth2/realms/root/realms/machine2machine/introspect?token={(string)context.Variables["token"]}") POST
@((string)context.Variables["authHeader"])
application/x-www-form-urlencoded
@($"token={(string)context.Variables["token"]}")
<set-variable name="isActive" value="@((((IResponse)context.Variables["tokenstate"]).Body.As().Value("active")) ?? false)" />
@($"introspect active = {(bool)context.Variables["isActive"]}")
Bearer error="invalid_token"
{"error":"Invalid Token. Authentication Failed"}
